code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut cur = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if has
          if neg
            nums = list.push(nums, 0 - cur)
          else
            nums = list.push(nums, cur)
          end
          cur = 0
          has = false
          neg = false
        end
      else if b == 45 and not has and not neg
        neg = true
      else
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        has = true
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      nums = list.push(nums, 0 - cur)
    else
      nums = list.push(nums, cur)
    end
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut j = list.len(nums) - 1
  mut first = true
  while j >= 0
    match list.get(nums, j)
    when Some(v)
      if first
        out = "#{v}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j - 1
  end
  println(out)
end
